name: local-file-transfer-desktop
description: Portable local-network file and text transfer between Windows and modern browsers
author: SpecQR contributors

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/main.cjs --external:electron && esbuild src/service.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/service.cjs --external:electron && esbuild src/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/preload.cjs --external:electron
scripts.dev: npm run build --prefix ../web && npm run build && electron .
scripts.pack: npm run build --prefix ../web && npm run build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build --prefix ../web && npm run build && electron-builder --win portable --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:arm64: npm run build --prefix ../web && npm run build && electron-builder --win portable --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:signed:x64: node scripts/require-signing-env.cjs && npm run build --prefix ../web && npm run build && electron-builder --win portable --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:signed:arm64: node scripts/require-signing-env.cjs && npm run build --prefix ../web && npm run build && electron-builder --win portable --arm64 --publish never
